title: As you Wish
description: Obtain a Magic Lamp and summon the Genie!
body:
### This mod Requires GeckoLib to Work!

### **Little help:**
**Now the Magic Lamp has 'charges' indicated on the tooltip, these charges are a max of 1 on copper and magic lamp. The Fast Lamp now has infinite charges. Magic Lamp and Copper Lamp can be recharged if a player right clicks a 'Heart of the Desert' with any of these lamps on off hand.**

This mod contains a new variety of 'Wishes', every wish can be obtained with the new entity, the Genie. The Genie can be summoned with a Magic Lamp, this new Lamp can be obtained on the new structure in the desert, the Genie Tombstone, but be carefull! it is full of Zombies and Skeletons defending the structure.

You can Re-Roll the wishes with 5 XP Levels.

When you summon the Genie it can't be gone until you right click it. Be carefull when you do this, because, if you right click the Genie him will despawn on the instant you right click him again, so use your wish carefully.

The Lamp can be upgraded to a Fast Lamp, when crafting the Fast Lamp this also repairs the Lamp, so it can be usefull. The Fast Lamp has a low cooldown and the same uses as a Magic Lamp.

The Genie also has a 20% chance that gives you Rare wishes when re-rolling wishes.

The rare wishes are the most OP ones, this rare wishes can be obtained via re-rolling, some of this wishes also can be obtained with the Random wish, but the Random Plus wish guarantees one rare wish.

In this mod you can also FIGHT the Genie! To do this you need to get the 'Freedom' wish, in this wish a Green Genie boss will spawn and when you defeat him it will grant you any wish of the list!

### The mod has a variety of wishes, here's a list of all the wishes:
- Midas Touch
- Random
- Villagers
- Gunpowder
- Clear Effects
- Friends
- Diamonds
- Floral Walk
- Gems
- Villages
- Reach
- Immortality
- Totem
- Cake
- Fish
- Health
- Raid
- Help
- Fly
- Omnipresence (Only if Gamerule is on true)
- Random Plus
- Freedom
- Firewalk
- Max Speed
- Storm
- Wish Bottle
- Excalibur
- Command (Only if Gamerule is on true)
- Feast
- Hunger
- Hunter
- Night Vision
- Warden
- Fins
- Knowledge
- Guard
- Haste
- Mutate
- Fight
- Bunny
- Wood
- TNT
- Strenght but Warden
- Tools but No Inventory

The updates will have new wishes everytime. Wait for it!

### Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/Gs2mPuzpvM) to receive news!
